falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 15% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would contradict the 'bottom' pattern assumption and invalidate the HOLD signal

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 70+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in blowoff score would indicate explosive momentum, directly contradicting the current HOLD position

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 3x the 30-day average on a single day with a bullish engulfing pattern
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a clear technical breakout with massive volume would falsify the UNKNOWN verdict by showing definitive trend reversal

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
